creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alexis Praga from comment #4)

Hello Alexis!

Strange that I didn't get this error on my testports at that time but I can reproduce it now.

dependency libepoll-shim-interpose.so:devel/libepoll-shim is from ibepoll-shim-0.0.20220703 (main) and it was not MFH to 2022Q3, actually 0.0.20210418.

Waiting for a MFH at https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=265017

Thanks
